{% block doc_content %} {% endblock %} {% endblock %} {% block vue_data %} // We get the active slug directly from the template context if available activeMenu: '{{ request.resolver_match.kwargs.slug|default:"" }}', docsDrawerVisible: false, {% endblock %} {% block vue_methods %} scrollToTop() { const el = document.getElementById('docs-main'); if (el) { try { el.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }); } catch(e) {} // 直接赋值 fallback（没有平滑动画的话但一定能回顶） // setTimeout() 防止冲突 setTimeout(() => { if(el.scrollTop > 0) el.scrollTop = 0; }, 50); } // 兜底方案：如果其实是全局滚动轴在起作用 try { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }); } catch(e) {} document.documentElement.scrollTop = 0; document.body.scrollTop = 0; }, {% endblock %}
